newsSince: No clearly dated new material company news in the June 9-23 window. AMEC remains an entrenched dielectric/TSV etch supplier (sub-5nm) with GaN MOCVD optionality (Prismo UniMax 100-chamber milestone, but that is mini-LED, not core AI etch, and timing is not new). The large +30.4% move since June 9 reflects China-equipment re-rating/flow rather than a fresh catalyst.

sources.label: Asia Times - China 50% domestic chip-tools drive lifts stocks
Futubull - AMEC 688012 stable performance, expanding portfolio

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold. AI-driven advanced-node/HBM/300mm etch spend and compound-semi/photonic-processing optionality remain relevant, but no fresh CPO-specific news landed since June 9. The sharp +30.4% pop is China-localization re-rating flow; rank 27 already captures most of the upside.
verdicts.bull: China-localization tailwind; sub-5nm dielectric/TSV etch entrenchment; GaN/photonic MOCVD optionality fits CPO.
verdicts.neutral: Strong domestic node but already up sharply; CPO link is optionality, not core.
verdicts.bear: +30.4% since June 9 with no new catalyst; China policy/competition risk; valuation discovery largely done.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: China advanced-node etch localization + compound-semi tools
